CreateARegularSecurityGroupV2.clientToken: Idempotency token, an ASCII string up to 64 characters. See [ClientToken Idempotency](VPC/API参考/通用说明.md#幂等性).
CreateARegularSecurityGroupV2.name: Name of the security group to create. Supports uppercase/lowercase letters, digits, Chinese characters, and special characters -\_ /. Must start with a letter, length 1-65.
CreateARegularSecurityGroupV2.vpcId: VPC ID to which the security group belongs.
CreateARegularSecurityGroupV2.desc: Description of the security group to create.
CreateARegularSecurityGroupV2.rules: List of security group rules to bind when creating the security group.
CreateARegularSecurityGroupV2.rules.direction: Inbound or outbound traffic direction. Valid values: ingress, egress.
CreateARegularSecurityGroupV2.rules.ethertype: Network type. Valid values: IPv4, IPv6. Defaults to IPv4 if empty.
CreateARegularSecurityGroupV2.rules.portRange: Port range. A single port such as 80 can be specified. Defaults to 1-65535 if empty.
CreateARegularSecurityGroupV2.rules.protocol: Protocol type: tcp, udp, or icmp. Defaults to all if empty.
CreateARegularSecurityGroupV2.rules.sourceIp: Source IP address. Cannot be set together with sourceGroupId.
CreateARegularSecurityGroupV2.rules.destIp: Destination IP address. Cannot be set together with destGroupId.
CreateARegularSecurityGroupV2.rules.createdTime: Creation time of the security group rule.
CreateARegularSecurityGroupV2.rules.updatedTime: Last update time of the security group rule.
CreateARegularSecurityGroupV2.tags: List of tags to bind when creating the security group.
CreateARegularSecurityGroupV2.tags.tagKey: Tag key. Supports uppercase/lowercase letters, digits, Chinese characters, and special characters -_ /., length 1-65.
CreateARegularSecurityGroupV2.tags.tagValue: Tag value. Supports uppercase/lowercase letters, digits, Chinese characters, and special characters -_ /., length 0-65.
